info.title: Optum API & Services Connection
info.description: Optum's API & Services Connection provides APIs for medical network eligibility verification, professional and institutional claims submission and validation, claims status checking, claims responses and reports, attachments management, prior authorization, enhanced eligibility with coverage discovery, dental attachments, and payer list management.

get.description: Check the health status of the Medical Network Eligibility v3 service

post.description: Accepts 270 EDI JSON object model and produces a JSON object model of a 271 response
Accepts raw x12 270 EDI transaction and produces a raw x12 271 response

get.description: Check the health status of the Professional Claims v3 service

post.description: Validate a professional claim before submission
Submit a professional claim for processing
Submit a professional claim using raw x12 837P format
Validate a professional claim using raw x12 837P format

get.description: Check the health status of the Institutional Claims v1 service

post.description: Validate an institutional claim before submission
Submit an institutional claim for processing
Submit an institutional claim using raw x12 837I format
Validate an institutional claim using raw x12 837I format

get.description: Check the health status of the Claims Responses and Reports v2 service
Retrieve a list of available claim response reports
Retrieve a specific report by filename

delete.description: Delete a specific report by filename

get.description: Convert a report to 277 format (claim status response)
Convert a report to 835 format (health care claim payment/advice)
Check the health status of the Claim Status v2 service

post.description: Check claim status using enhanced raw x12 276 format
Check claim status using JSON format
Check claim status using raw x12 276 format

get.description: Check the health status of the Attachment Submission v1 service

post.description: Submit an attachment document

get.description: Check the health status of the Attachment Status v1 service
Retrieve the attachment status based on traceId

parameters.name: traceId
parameters.description: The trace ID for the attachment

post.description: Retrieve the attachment status based on metadata

get.description: Check the health status of the Attachment Retrieval v1 service

post.description: Search for attachment documents

get.description: Download a document for the given documentId

post.description: Create a new attachment container for dental documents
Add attachment files to an existing container

put.description: Update attachment files in a container

patch.description: Commit an attachments container and its files for submission

get.description: Retrieve an attachment container by ID
Get list of attachment files from a container

delete.description: Delete a specific attachment file from a container

get.description: Retrieve list of all participating payers for dental attachments

get.summary: Check Participating Payer by Payer ID
get.description: Check if a specific payer is a participating payer
Get payer business rules for the authenticated user

post.description: Submit a new eligibility request for enhanced processing

get.description: Find all eligibility transactions
Find a specific eligibility transaction by its ID

post.description: Submit new coverage discovery task(s) using EDI x12 format
Submit new coverage discovery task(s) using JSON format

get.description: Find all coverage discovery tasks
Find a specific coverage discovery task by its ID
Validate the status of the Enhanced Eligibility system

Retrieve list of payers

Get available fields for payer list filtering
